articles.title: Side Hustle Tax Rules in the UK: When HMRC Needs to Know
articles.metaTitle: Side Hustle Tax Rules UK 2026: When HMRC Needs to Know
articles.metaDescription: Earning extra money in the UK? Here is exactly when you owe tax on a side hustle, what the £1,000 allowance covers, and what Vinted and eBay now tell HMRC.
